caption: The video features an individual standing behind a podium, delivering a speech. The person is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white kurta and vest, and has a distinguished appearance with white hair and a beard. The background consists of a textured wall with a geometric pattern, adding a formal and official atmosphere to the setting. To the right of the podium, there is a decorative element with red flowers, enhancing the ceremonial feel of the event. The individual appears to be speaking into two microphones, suggesting that this is a significant public address or announcement. The overall setting indicates a formal occasion, possibly a governmental or cultural event.
